data.title: BOXABL Inc. receives South Carolina approval and secures contract for eco-luxury cabin resorts expansion. Merging with FG Merger Corp. (NASDAQ: FGMC).
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Las Vegas, BOXABL Inc., a company specializing in innovative modular housing solutions, revealed that it has obtained regulatory clearance for the implementation of its merger with FG Merger Corp. (NASDAQ: FGMC). BOXABL Inc. is currently undergoing an S-4 registration process for this merger.
ING: COMPLETING ING BANK (EURASIA) SALE IN Q3 ‘NOT REALISTIC’
Under Trump Latest Plan, Britain Would Face 100% Tariffs On US Pharmaceuticals– RTRS Sources

data.title: Pet King Brands sponsors IndiePet event, supporting indie pet stores. Industry leader of enzymatic pet health care.
data.description: Pet King Brands, the company known for ZYMOX® and Oratene®, is backing independent pet stores by sponsoring the IndiePet event. This gesture was made in Austin, Texas, on September 26, 2025. Pet King Brands is a top provider of enzymatic pet health products endorsed by veterinarians and is the mastermind behind the acclaimed ZYMOX line.

data.title: Americans should know buying a car is a significant financial commitment after buying a home. Dealerships still central.
data.description: In Irvine, California on September 26, 2025, it was highlighted that acquiring a car stands as a significant financial decision for many Americans, rivaling only buying a home in terms of financial commitment. Despite the growth of online sales platforms, traditional dealerships maintain a crucial position in the car purchasing journey.

data.title: Canopy Growth Corp's annual meeting adjourned due to lack of quorum, rescheduled to October 10, 2025 at 1:00pm Eastern Time.
data.description: Smiths Falls, Ontario - Canopy Growth Corporation (TSX:WEED) (NASDAQ:CGC) has reported that the annual general and special meeting of shareholders initially scheduled for September 26, 2025 at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time did not meet the required quorum. Therefore, the meeting was adjourned and will now take place on October 10 at 1:00 PM ET. The rescheduled meeting will be conducted through a live audio webcast at www.virtualsharehold.

data.title: Sinclair stops boycott of Jimmy Kimmel, popular talk show host.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the global economy is expected to grow by 4.3% in 2022, following a 5.9% growth in 2021. This projection is based on an increase in consumer spending and business investments, although concerns about inflation and supply chain disruptions remain. The report also highlighted that emerging markets are set to grow by 5.2% in 2022, outpacing advanced economies, and that the recovery is uneven across regions. Furthermore, the report mentioned that inflation is forecasted to reach 3.7% in advanced economies and 5.1% in emerging markets. Overall, the outlook for the global economy remains positive, but risks persist due to ongoing challenges in the post-pandemic recovery.

data.title: While Witkoff promoted Mideast peace, his son pursued funds from Gulf states like Qatar, with a history of investing in Witkoff projects for Trump's favor.
data.description: The son of real estate developer Steve Witkoff reportedly requested funding from Gulf nations, including Qatar, which has previously invested in projects associated with the Witkoff family, in an attempt to secure favor with President Trump.

BOWMAN CRITICIZES THE FIXED AND DOGMATIC FOCUS ON RECENT DATA, CLAIMING IT RESULTS IN A BACKWARD-LOOKING VIEW OF THE ECONOMY AND KEEPS US BEHIND. HE SUGGESTS THE FEDERAL RESERVE SHOULD SWITCH FROM EMPHASIZING CURRENT DATA TO ADOPTING A PROACTIVE, FORWARD-LOOKING APPROACH.
Fed's Bowman: I prefer the smallest balance sheet possible with reserves closer to scarce than ample.

data.title: MSI opens new design center at THE MART in Chicago, showcasing flooring, countertops, wall tile, and hardscaping products.
data.description: In Orange, California on September 26, 2025, M S International, Inc. (MSI), a top provider of flooring, countertops, wall tile, and hardscaping items in North America, unveiled its latest design center at THE MART, a hub for cutting-edge businesses in Chicago. This move showcases MSI's commitment to expansion and offering premium products to its customers.

data.title: AI creates 16 viruses with new genomes, infect E. coli in lab. Landmark experiment hints at machine-driven evolution.
data.description: In a groundbreaking study, researchers from Stanford and the Arc Institute employed "genome language models" to create and assemble 16 novel viruses that targeted E. coli. This study marks a significant milestone in the field of machine-generated evolution.

data.title: Market experts predict Ether may enter unprecedented "supercycle" fueled by Wall Street embrace, pushing price beyond cycle norms, owned by top ETH holder.
data.description: An individual holding a significant amount of Ether predicts that the cryptocurrency may experience its first "supercycle" due to increased adoption on Wall Street. This cycle is expected to extend Ether's price growth beyond the typical four-year cycle. This forecast is based on the actions of the largest corporate holder of ETH.

data.title: Champion Safe displays premium safes at Maricopa County Home Show in Scottsdale, AZ, owned by American Rebel Holdings.
data.description: This weekend in Scottsdale, Arizona, Champion Safe Company, a top producer of high-security safes and a subsidiary of American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), known as America’s Patriotic Brand, is presenting its products at the Maricopa County Home Show located at WestWorld. The exhibition is conducted through the company’s owned retailer, Arizona Safe Outlet.

data.title: HK & mainland China start cross-border bond repo business to boost RMB liquidity & attract global investors.
data.description: Hong Kong Monetary Authority and Mainland China collaborate to introduce a cross-boundary bond repo initiative in efforts to strengthen RMB liquidity and entice international investors. This move aims to attract a larger pool of investors to boost economic growth.
Fed's Bowman: It's too early to say how AI is affecting the labor force.
Casino Group reports $1.2 billion in revenue for third quarter, showing 5% growth compared to previous year.
White House will honor 15% cap on pharma tariffs as part of trade deals with EU and Japan – CNBC

data.title: American Cancer Society & NFL's Crucial Catch boosts cancer screening rates, raising 5-year survival rate to over 90%.
data.description: Crucial Catch is enhancing cancer outcomes across the country by focusing on screening accessibility in NFL markets. According to recent data from September 26, 2025, the survival rate for various types of cancer exceeds 90% if detected within 5 years. Early detection through screening is vital in identifying cancer at a stage where effective treatment strategies can be implemented.

data.title: Ethos filed registration statement for IPO of Class A common stock with unspecified number of shares and price range.
data.description: Austin, TX - On September 26, 2025, Ethos, a prominent life insurance technology firm working towards enhancing access to life insurance, revealed its submission of a registration statement on Form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a potential initial public offering of its Class A common stock. As of now, the specific number of shares to be included in the offering and the price range have not been finalized.
